compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Enable the feature for THIS project + docs + full test pass. Done LAST so build-time closes aren't gated.

## Scope (files)
- `rebar.toml` (NEW, TRACKED) enables `[verify] require_completion_verification_for_close = true` + `[mcp] allow_llm = true` for the project (`.rebar/config.conf` is git-ignored, so a tracked config is used so the setting is shared). The BL-1 regression test still verifies the dotted-`.conf` parsing (and that the INI form is dropped) via `REBAR_CONFIG`.
- `docs/llm-framework.md`: completion-verification section (op, contract, gate, trust model, force-close, pluggable contract). `CLAUDE.md`: add `verify_completion` to the LLM-ops list + gate flag. `docs/output-schemas.md`: add `completion_verdict` row.
- Tests: config (BL-1 regression), gate behavior, schema coverage guard, optionality, BI-1.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] the tracked `rebar.toml` enables the gate for the project (verified via load_config); BL-1 regression test confirms dotted-`.conf` parsing + INI-form-dropped
- [ ] docs updated (llm-framework / CLAUDE.md / output-schemas)
- [ ] full suite green (`-m "not integration and not external"`)
compiled_state.title: WS-5: Enable for this project + docs + tests
